feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Desktop Agent 3 Installation Problem
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
I am currently working with Desktop Agent 2.0.36.41 and everything works fine, but we are in the process of migrating all the Desktop Studio bots to Cloud studio bots (so that we can move ahead with RPA to BPA), I would also need to switch to Desktop Agent 3.
I followed the documentation below to try and download desktop agent 3
I also generated a new secret id 
https://help.sap.com/docs/intelligent-robotic-process-automation/desktop-agent-user-guide/enable-agent-download-and-automatic-updates 

But I still get the error "Unable to download"
@peterengel @SAPSupport 
Please let me know, if I am missing out on anything or if you have any solution to this problem

entry.title: SAP Cloud studio - Unattended Bot - Execution after SAP logon System - login success
entry.content:
I am in the process of migrating all my unattended bots that were previously developed using Desktop Studio to Cloud studio. As of now I am done with a couple of bots and have checked their execution on my local machine in unattended mode, Everything works as expected.
However, when I schedule the same on the server machine that we have, which already has had unattended automations running since past few years. My newly built automations from the cloud studio get stuck after logging in to the SAP Systems via SAP Logon.
Local Desktop Agent Version : 2.0.36.41
Server Desktop Agent Version: 2.0.31.60

Project properties -> Configured Desktop Agent Version -> 2.0.31

@peterengel @Chaitanya_Priya @SAPSupport 

please help

entry.title: Migration of Workflow to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

My team and I are currently engaged in migrating workflows from Workflow Management to SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). We have been following the guidelines outlined in the documentation available at SAP Help Portal. However, we encountered an issue during step 4, which requires the import of the MTAR file from the old workflow, as there was no content available in the Manage Package application. Upon attempting this, we received the following error:

Additionally, it is important to note that our workflow module does not contain any "*.extension" files or any "packageinfo".

We seek your guidance on resolving this issue and would appreciate confirmation on whether our current approach is appropriate.

Furthermore, we plan to utilize BPA exclusively for workflow development. Could you please advise if it is feasible to edit the workflows directly within BPA after importing them, or will we need to continue using BAS for older workflows?

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,
Paul

entry.title: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My team and I are currently developing an application that requires the integration of workflows. It has come to my attention that SAP is actively addressing this topic, with an update released on August 16th.

At present, we are encountering issues when attempting to import these workflows into SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). I came across a community post from a year ago in which an SAP expert mentioned that workflows developed within BAS could only be managed and updated within BAS. Our intention was to use BPA exclusively for development.

Given the recent update, we would appreciate clarification on whether it is now possible to use BPA as the sole development environment, or if we are still required to manage the older workflows in BAS.

For reference, here is the community post from a year ago:
Workflow Migration 

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

Gabriel

entry.title: Deserialize JSON in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I have used Call Web Serivice to consume an API,

Now i want to get values from JSON returned from it
Can anyone help with custom script any standard procedure ?

The output parameter (obj) is type "ANY"

Sample JSON:

{

    "orderNum": "A987654321",

    "customerName": "John Doe"

}

 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: BPA Automation doesnt stop running,
entry.content:
Hey, I have the following problem. I'm doing a sap developers tutorial.

 

 

 

 

 

When testing the automated process, it works perfectly, extracting the order data I need.

When I deploy and test the entire process completely, from the workflows panel it is evident that the automated process is reached and started, but it never ends and obviously it does not extract the information I need. I'm almost completely sure that I followed the tutorial to the letter and it still gives me that error.

Help please

entry.title: Consuming SOAP service from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I am looking for any documentation or information regarding how to call a SOAP service to POST values into S/4HANA public from SAP Build Process Automation


I don't see it as a part of Build Actions readily to consume SOAP calls

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Error after creating a project in SAP BUild Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

I have created the project by entering the project name and description in lobby of Sap Build. Once we click on create it will redirect to home page of "SAP Build Process Automation" but it not loading the homepage .

I am getting the below error:

I will appreciate if someone help me on this. Thank in advance.

entry.title: SBPA: Decision step in Process fails with error destination 'bpmworkflowruntime_rule' not found
entry.content:
I modeled a Process with a Decision step in SAP Build Process Automation tenant in my trial account in us10. When the process is executed, the Decision step fails. I find the following error message in monitor.

 

Rule Service Id:
5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979
Rule Service Version:
000001000000000000
Error message:
The destination 'bpmworkflowruntime_rule' could not be found in tenant with subdomain 'xxxx'. Create it or check the spelling.
Log ID:
00a116ea-ed45-40b6-be8b-f11f3ea-us10

 

I could not find any documentation on how to configure this destination. I tried configuring this destination like what is mentioned in the documentation for sap_process_automation_service. Now the error message changed to:

 

Rule Service Id:
5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979
Rule Service Version:
000001000000000000
Error message:
The HTTP request to 'https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/rules-service/rest/v2/rule-services/5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979/versions/000001000000000000' failed with status code 404 (Not Found) and response body '{"timestamp":1724432145560,"path":"/rules-service/rest/v2/rule-services/5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979/versions/000001000000000000","status":404,"error":"Not Found","message":null,"requestId":"6c60e980-1842992"}'.
Log ID:
1ea78a17-4443-4aa3-aca9-dee1b8e-us10

 

The path prefix of the requested URL appears wrong. It should have been `/public/rule/runtime/rest`; `/rules-service/rest`is from Business Rules (Workflow Management). 

How can I resolve this?

entry.title: Build Process Automation Custom Form - Consuming API via Destination
entry.content:
Dear community,
we are creating a workflow with SAP BPA that uses a custom form. In this form we need to make POST and DEL calls consuming SAP oData.

SAP is reachable via Cloud Connector, the Destination has been created, imported into BPA, Actions have been created to test that everything is working correctly. Up to this point everything is fine.

The problem arises when we try to use these services in the custom approval form controller.

 

 

 

 

 

 

In xs-app-json we added this route

{
  "source": "^/odata/(.*)$",
  "target": "/$1",
  "destination": "sap_process_automation_odata",
  "authenticationType": "none",
  "csrfProtection": false
},

in form.controller.js we added this code

_updateOdata: function() {
  $.ajax({
    url: that._getODataURL(),
    method: "GET",
    async: false,
    contentType: "application/json",
    headers: {
      "X-CSRF-Token": "fetch",
    },
    complete: function (result, status) {
      token = result.getResponseHeader("X-CSRF-Token");
      console.log("SapToken: " + token);
    },
  });
  /* OTHER CODE*
}

_getODataURL: function () {
  var appId = this.getOwnerComponent().getManifestEntry("/sap.app/id");
  var appPath = appId.replaceAll(".", "/");
  var appModulePath = jQuery.sap.getModulePath(appPath);

  return appModulePath + "/odata/sap/ZODATA";
},

What I expect to happen with this code is to get the token to use for the next POST or DEL call, but the call fails with a 500 or 404 error.

The way the route is configured, the address should resolve to
https://<host>:44301/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZODATA
but evidently something is not correct.

I add that this form allows you to write and read files in the BTP Document Management Service via API, using a very similar approach and this is working.

I have done this in the past on other custom task forms, but with Workflow Manager (maybe there is some difference that we have not noticed).

Anyone have any suggestions?

Thanks and Best Regards,
Giampaolo

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Cannot unsubscribe from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In my BTP Subaccount I was trying to delete the SAP Build Process Automation subcription. Unfortunately I get a message saying. "Unsubsription failed".



I already removed any Process Automations in the SAP Build Lobby but I still get the same error.
I found some other questions also with the same error in the community but none that have been resolved with a explanation.
Any help would be appreciated.

Best Regards,

Lukas

entry.title: SAP_IPA_13300: Unable to get environment (ID: default)
entry.content:
I am learning SAP BPA and i am trying to deploy this free tier exercise i have this error when i click the public



I did not use a template from store i just created the project in the lobby. I really do not know the fix for this since i am just starting.

entry.title: Re: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Gabriel,

Thank you for reaching out to us. I recommend you follow the step-by-step guide below to migrate from Workflow Management to SAP Build Process Automation.https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/transition-your-sap-workflow-management-solutio...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/migrate-your-sap-btp-neo-workflow-applications-...In case you encounter any issues, please don't hesitate to let us know.

entry.title: Re: Deserialize JSON in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Are you still experiencing any issues? If so, have you tried creating a new data type and mapping it with a new variable to extract the data?

Please let us know if the issue persists.

entry.title: SAP BPA application shows Blank Page
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have successfully subscribed for SAP BPA and it got created as well & then completed the role assignment also. But while accessing the BPA application, it is showing blank page.

Could you please suggest how to fix this.

Many Thanks

entry.title: Share data between SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Use Case:

  1. SAP Process Automation 1: regularly read elements via SAP GUI
  2. SAP Build Apps: allow users to update elements.
  3. SAP Process Automation 2: regularly write updated elements via SAP GUI

What is the best practice approach / reference architecture for persisting the data, allowing to share between SAP Build Apps # and SAP Build Process Automation?

entry.title: Sap Scripting with VBA
entry.content: Hey all, I am looking for assistance in automating a specific task in APO using Excel VBA. If anyone can help, please message me.

entry.title: Unable to laod SAP Build Process Automation - In Maintenance Mode message
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When i try to open my SAP Build Process Automation, I'm getting the below attached message.

 

Any idea why i'm getting this? or how much more time it would take? Can i do something to fix this?

I was trying to complete the following tutorial when it started - Create a CAP Service with BAS Productivity Tools and I had completed the setup of SAP Build Apps with Booster when the Maintenance message appeared.

Thanks in advance

Adam

entry.title: Open Excel Instance SAP Build Process Automation on Mac
entry.content:
Hi, 

im trying to open a excel instance in sap build process automation on the MAC. But the functionality is not choosable. Do you have any idea, desktop agent is running and connected. 

Control Tower and Agent are just shown as Windows platform, is there a way to update this to mac on the trial account? 

BR

entry.title: Live Process Import Error
entry.content:
Importing a Live Process Project results in an error without any further information other than asking to raise an incident which I anyway plan to do, checking if anyone else has seen this error and suggest what possibly is going wrong or missing. 

Error: [customui] [ERROR] Deploying in org "dcd43088trial_sk-btp-kpqxpqu9" and space "SPACE"

Live Process Project being added: Project Approval and Release

Once added I am expecting to see this under Lobby but there is nothing visible, also what I have noticed is some service instances getting created under BTP related to this Process.

Thanks

Sreenivas
